scenarios.correlation_description: Negatively correlated: If Heads, YOU receive $10 and your partner receives $20. If Tails, YOU receive $20 and your partner receives $10.
scenarios.info_description: Your partner (the informed player) knows the actual result of the coin toss for the Risky option. You do NOT know the coin toss result — you only know the correlation structure. Your partner will vote for the Risky option if and only if the Risky option gives her the high payoff ($20). She will vote for the Safe option if the Risky option gives her the low payoff ($10).

scenarios.correlation_description: Positively correlated: If Heads, you BOTH receive $10. If Tails, you BOTH receive $20.
scenarios.info_description: Your partner (the informed player) knows the actual result of the coin toss for the Risky option. You do NOT know the coin toss result — you only know the correlation structure. Your partner will vote for the Risky option if and only if the Risky option gives her the high payoff ($20). She will vote for the Safe option if the Risky option gives her the low payoff ($10).
